business_ideas.idea: AI-powered personal styling with color theory and outfit recommendations, sold daily or as upsell
AI-generated personalized outreach at scale using Clay to scrape public data and create custom content
Social-first AI products (Discord communities for shared outcomes vs. siloed individual use)
AI workflow marketplace (fork/remix workflows like Zapier recipes but with social proof)

predictions.text: AI models will soon be commoditized and the major advantage shift to distribution and go-to-market mechanics
